ふぅ……素振りはこれくらいにして、<br>次は走り込みをするわよ、司令官っ。:
Phew... That's enough practice swings. Up next: running drills,
Commander!
――って、何よ？ もうへばってるのかしら？<br>まあ、珍しく訓練に付き合うって:
What? You're already wiped out? Well, I kind of figured when you
actually volunteered to train with me for once.
え？ やっぱり、体を動かすのは自分には向いていない……？<br>頭を使って戦うの:
Huh? So physical training really isn't your thing...? Fighting with your
head is your style, huh...
それって、いつも頭を使わずに戦っているって、私のことをからかってるの<br>かし:
So you're teasing me about fighting without using my head, aren't
you? Ah, he ran away! You can run—plenty of energy, don't you!
